gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/348)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/348)
text: كُنْتُ أَمْشِي مَعَ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فَانْقَطَعَ شِسْعُ نَعْلِهِ فَأَخْرَجْتُ مِنْ كُمِّي شِسْعاً فَأَصْلَحَ بِهِ نَعْلَهُ ثُمَّ ضَرَبَ يَدَهُ عَلَى كَتِفِيَ الْأَيْسَرِ وَ قَالَ يَا عَبْدَ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنَ كَثِيرٍ مَنْ حَمَلَ مُؤْمِناً عَلَى شِسْعِ نَعْلِهِ حَمَلَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَى نَاقَةٍ دَمْكَاءَ حِينَ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ قَبْرِهِ حَتَّى يَقْرَعَ بَابَ الْجَنَّةِ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, form Ali Bin Hassan, form Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseer who said,

‘I was walking along with Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, so the strap of his<sup>asws</sup> sandal got cut (broke). So I took out a strap from my bag and he<sup>asws</sup> repaired his<sup>asws</sup> sandal by it, then struck his<sup>asws</sup> hand upon my left shoulder and said: ‘O Abdul Rahman Bin Kaseyr! The one who supports a Believer upon a strap of his sandal, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic would Carry him upon a fast camel when he comes out from his grave until he knocks the door of the Paradise’.
en.sarwar: 13. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad, from Ali ibn Hassan, from ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Kathir who has said the following: “I once was walking with abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when the thong and strap of his shoe broke. I took out one from my bag with which he repaired his shoe. He (the Imam) touched my left shoulder saying, ‘O ‘Abd al-Rahman ibn Kathir, if one helps a believing person in the matters of his shoe thong Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, will carry him on a fast running camel when he comes out of his grave until he will knock at the door of the garden (paradises).”’
